pilot_experiments.objective: Validate whether 9 persistent core words represent genuine hierarchy-driven absorption
pilot_experiments.method: Causal intervention - suppress child feature activation to zero, measure parent recovery

prompt_words.template: The sequence is eight, seven, six
The score is lower than expected
The value is around five hundred

pilot_experiments.control: Random SAE baseline (frozen orthonormal decoder, random encoder)
pilot_experiments.expected_outcome: Based on H7 (trained < random absorption), expecting metric artifact interpretation to dominate, but pilot will confirm or refute

pilot_experiments.hypothesis: H7 extension: Random SAE shows different recovery patterns
pilot_experiments.objective: Compare activation patching recovery between trained and random SAE
pilot_experiments.method: Same as activation_patching_pilot but using random SAE baseline
pilot_experiments.expected_outcome: If H7 interpretation is correct, trained SAE should show HIGHER recovery (more genuine absorption that can be reversed) while random SAE shows LOWER recovery (spurious correlations)

pilot_experiments.hypothesis: Exploratory: Dead features may explain high absorption metrics
pilot_experiments.objective: Stratify activation patching results by feature L0 (active vs dead)
pilot_experiments.method: Divide features into L0 > threshold (active) vs L0 = 0 (dead), compare recovery rates

pass_criteria.dead_features_same: dead_recovery ~= active_recovery (dead ratio doesn't affect conclusions)

pilot_experiments.expected_outcome: If dead features explain absorption patterns, this validates concerns about 89-99% dead ratio

pilot_summary.key_decision: After pilot, decide whether to proceed to full experiment (26 words) or pivot based on inconclusive results

go_full_experiment: Pilot shows recovery_rate > 0.3 for >50% of words
Trained SAE shows higher recovery than random SAE
Results are not dominated by dead features
go_inconclusive: Results show mixed pattern but still informative
Report as 'inconclusive but suggestive of metric artifact'
no_go_pivot: Dead features dominate making any conclusion unreliable
